zh.lifeSummary: 當Ermengarde de Bourbon於大約1049年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯a奧-波爾希時，她的父親Archambaud de BOURBON IV 'le Fort'20歲，母親Beliarde d'Auvergne19歲。她於1055年之後與Godefroy de Forcalquier結婚。她去世於大約1125年在法國諾門迪奧內莫塔尼-奧-享年78歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bourbon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from a village in Allier, the site of the (now ruined) castle of Bourbon, or from another place called (Le) Bourbon, mainly in the southern part of France. The placename is derived from a Celtic and pre-Celtic element borb- denoting a hot spring.

History: The progenitor of a large part of the American bearers of the surname Bourbon was Jean-Pierre Bourbon from Salins-les-Bains in Jura, France, who settled in MO in the middle of the 19th century. However, many bearers of the surname claim a connection with the house of Bourbon, which provided generations of monarchs of France and Spain and other European royalty. It takes its name from the castle of Bourbon in Allier, which was held by Adhémar, a 9th-century noble. His descendant Beatrice, heiress of Bourbon, married Robert of Clermont, 6th son of King Louis IX of France, in 1272, and these two are considered founders of the royal house. Robert's son Louis was created Duke of Bourbon in 1327. By the 16th century they had added much of southern France, the dukedom of Vendôme, and the kingdom of Navarre to their fiefs, and in 1589 a Bourbon succeeded to the throne of France as Henry IV. His grandson, Louis XIV, called ‘the Sun King’, reigned 1643–1715, presiding over a golden age of French literature and art and attempting to establish French supremacy in Europe. The Bourbons ruled France until the Revolution in 1793 and again 1815–48. The present claimants to the French throne are descended from Louis XIV's brother, Philippe, Duke of Orléans. The Bourbons acquired the Spanish throne in 1700, when a grandson of Louis XIV succeeded as Philip V; they ruled until 1931 and were restored, in the person of King Juan Carlos, in 1975. The Bourbon kings of the Two Sicilies (i.e. Sicily and Naples), 1759–1861, and Bourbon dukes of Parma, 1748–1860, were descended from the Spanish branch of the family.

variants.name: Borbon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Ana, Jesus, Marta, Miguel Angel, Tomas, Ademar, Alfredo, Ana Maria, Bernabe, Berta, Carlos.

nameMeanings.name: Ermengarde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Ermengarde de Bourbon was born about 1049, in Château-Porcien, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, her father, Archambaud de BOURBON IV 'le Fort', was 20 and her mother, Beliarde d'Auvergne, was 19. She married Godefroy de Forcalquier after 1055. She died about 1125, in Mortagne-au-Perche, Orne, Normandy, France, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ermengarde de Bourbon est née environ 1049, à Château-Porcien, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Archambaud de BOURBON IV 'le Fort', avait 20 ans et sa mère, Beliarde d'Auvergne, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Godefroy de Forcalquier après 1055. Elle est décédée environ 1125, à Mortagne-au-Perche, Orne, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ermengarde de Bourbon um 1049 in Château-Porcien, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Archambaud de BOURBON IV 'le Fort' 20 und ihre Mutter Beliarde d'Auvergne 19. Sie hat nach 1055 Godefroy de Forcalquier geheiratet. Sie starb um 1125 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Mortagne-au-Perche, Orne, Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ermengarde de Bourbon è nata il circa 1049 nel Château-Porcien, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, sua padre, Archambaud de BOURBON IV 'le Fort', aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Beliarde d'Auvergne, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Godefroy de Forcalquier dopo il 1055. Morì circa 1125, nel Mortagne-au-Perche, Orne, Normandie, Francia, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ermengarde de Bourbonが約1049年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアルデンスチaテアウ-プオルシンで生まれた時，父Archambaud de BOURBON IV 'le Fort'は20歳，母Beliarde d'Auvergneは19歳であった。1055年以後にGodefroy de Forcalquierと結婚した。彼女は約1125年にフランスノーマンディオルンモータグネ-アウ-ペルチェで78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ermengarde de Bourbon(이)가 대략 1049년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 아데네스 cha테오-포르시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Archambaud de BOURBON IV 'le Fort'(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beliarde d'Auvergne(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1055년 이후 Godefroy de Forcalquier(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 대략 1125년 프랑스 노먼디 른 모르타그니-오-퍼체에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ermengarde de Bourbon nasceu aproximadamente 1049, em Château-Porcien, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Archambaud de BOURBON IV 'le Fort', tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Beliarde d'Auvergne, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Godefroy de Forcalquier após 1055. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1125, em Mortagne-au-Perche, Orne, Normandie, França, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ermengarde de Bourbon родилась около 1049 г. в местности чaто-порсиен, арденнесь, чампагне-арденн, Франция, её отцу по имени Archambaud de BOURBON IV 'le Fort' было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Beliarde d'Auvergne, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Godefroy de Forcalquier после 1055 г. Она умерла около 1125 г. в местности мортагне-ау-пирч, орн, норманди, Франция в возрасте 78 лет.
